description: The certified lockstep set: these tool versions are verified TOGETHER (walkabout + headless fixture gates + LF fast suite + the Phase 0 engine leg on Godot 4.7 stable/Windows: import gate, nav gate, runtime walktest, 4-player multiplayer smoke). Tools stay standalone repos with their own semver; this manifest pins the combination. Check with: level-factory verify-manifest --factory <this dir>. -- 1.2.0 (2026-07-19): zoo 0.30.2 -> 0.34.0 (floor/ceiling surface species + 6 tiling material kinds) and pixelcoat 0.9.0 -> 0.10.0 (DELCO signage packs). Verified this cycle: zoo unit suite green (203 passed / 2 skipped); factory-wide bpy-in-pytest audit (only zoo/bpylayer imports bpy at module level; deli_counter + patina already guard theirs); zoo walkabout green (real Blender build at v0.34.0, 147 fixtures, LuxEmit marker contract present); pixelcoat DELCO signage packs built green at 0.10.0; LF real-tool smoke passes for the two changed tools (zoo, pixelcoat). See known_issues for three real-tool smokes that remain red in UNCHANGED adapters -- none implicate the zoo/pixelcoat bumps.
known_issues: test_real_dispatch: dispatch example mission expects deli_counter/shell.gameplay.json which is not built on disk. Root cause: deli_counter repo is at git v0.80.0-1-dirty (38 uncommitted files) while VERSION/manifest pin 0.79.0 -- reconcile that drift and regenerate the export. Not a zoo/pixelcoat regression.
test_real_lasertag_runner_and_invocation: staged Godot project lacks .godot/global_script_class_cache.cfg. Seed it by opening the lasertag project in Godot 4.7 once. lasertag unchanged this cycle.
test_real_lux_addon_and_driver_invocation: same Godot class-cache-not-seeded issue for lux. Seed by opening the lux project in Godot 4.7 once. lux unchanged this cycle.

deli_counter.note: installed repo is drifted to git v0.80.0-1-dirty; VERSION file + this pin remain 0.79.0. Reconcile before the next factory cut.

laser_tag.note: no VERSION source yet - reports UNKNOWN by design

pipeline.note: production registrar; reference records carry PASS engine gates as of factory 1.1.0
